display.purpose: Balance set pieces only. One per page. The most-tested element on Home.

title.purpose: The delta figure (percent + dollars) and any monetary mid-scale element.

body.purpose: Account holder names, activity row labels, descriptions. Sans, 65–75ch where prose appears.

label.purpose: Section orienting labels (Account balance, Activity, Switch account). Uppercase, generous letter-spacing.

mono-numeric.purpose: Every secondary numeric: activity row meta, account numbers, dates, timestamps. Always tabular figures.

shadows.name: lift-low
shadows.purpose: Dropdowns, tooltips, and command-palette overlays anchored to a trigger. The only shadow used in the system today.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Default easing for every transition and reveal sequence. No bounce, no elastic, no ease-in.

motion.name: duration-state
motion.purpose: Hover, focus, color, and border-color state transitions.

motion.name: duration-transition
motion.purpose: Activity row stagger fade-in, secondary reveal steps.

motion.name: reveal-total
motion.purpose: Full Home first-paint reveal sequence runtime, end to end.

components.name: Specimen Balance
components.description: The set-piece mono balance on the Home tab. Click routes to Statements.
components.css: .ds-balance { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, monospace; font-size: clamp(3rem, 8vw, 4.5rem); line-height: 1; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: -0.025em; color: oklch(20% 0.015 75); font-feature-settings: 'tnum' on, 'lnum' on; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums lining-nums; background: none; border: none; padding: 0; text-align: left; display: block; cursor: pointer; transition: color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-balance:hover, .ds-balance:focus-visible { color: oklch(28% 0.018 75); outline: none; } .ds-balance-cents { color: oklch(48% 0.012 75); font-weight: 400; }

components.name: Period Delta (positive)
components.description: The sign-colored period delta. Carries the chromatic spark on the Home tab.
components.css: .ds-delta { margin-top: 1.5rem; display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 0.875rem; flex-wrap: wrap; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-feature-settings: 'tnum' on, 'lnum' on; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums lining-nums; cursor: pointer; background: none; border: none; padding: 0; text-align: left; color: inherit; } .ds-delta:focus-visible { outline: none; } .ds-delta-figure { font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: -0.01em; } .ds-delta--positive .ds-delta-figure { color: oklch(45% 0.085 145); } .ds-delta--negative .ds-delta-figure { color: oklch(42% 0.110 25); } .ds-delta-period { font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; color: oklch(48% 0.012 75); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; font-weight: 500; }

components.name: Activity Row
components.description: Row in the Home tab Activity feed: 3-column grid of date / name / signed amount. Hover translates 0.5rem right.
components.html: Apr 30March 2024 statement closed+$22,891.40
components.css: .ds-activity-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 4.5rem 1fr auto; align-items: baseline; gap: 1rem; padding: 0.75rem 0; border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(89% 0.013 75); cursor: pointer; color: oklch(20% 0.015 75); text-decoration: none; transition: padding 180ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-activity-row:hover, .ds-activity-row:focus-visible { padding-left: 0.5rem; outline: none; } .ds-activity-date { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; color: oklch(48% 0.012 75); font-feature-settings: 'tnum' on, 'lnum' on; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums lining-nums; letter-spacing: -0.005em; } .ds-activity-name { font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: -0.005em; } .ds-activity-meta { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-feature-settings: 'tnum' on, 'lnum' on; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums lining-nums; text-align: right; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-activity-meta--positive { color: oklch(45% 0.085 145); } .ds-activity-meta--negative { color: oklch(42% 0.110 25); } .ds-activity-meta--caution { color: oklch(58% 0.100 75); } .ds-activity-meta--neutral { color: oklch(48% 0.012 75); }

components.name: Section Label
components.description: Uppercase orienting label above each zone (Account balance, Activity, Switch account, Other accounts).
components.css: .ds-section-label { font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 500; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.12em; color: oklch(48% 0.012 75); margin: 0 0 0.875rem; }

components.name: Activity Panel
components.description: Tonal Bone-Field band that hosts the Activity feed. No card, no shadow, no radius. Bleeds to the column edges via negative horizontal margin.

components.css: .ds-panel-field { background-color: oklch(96% 0.009 75); margin: 0 -2rem; padding: 2.25rem 2rem 2.5rem; } .ds-panel-list { list-style: none; margin: 0; padding: 0; border-top: 1px solid oklch(89% 0.013 75); }

components.name: Switcher Trigger (typeahead button)
components.description: The override style applied over the existing Bootstrap Dropdown trigger so the typeahead reads as part of the masthead, not as Bootstrap chrome.
components.css: .ds-switcher-trigger { background-color: transparent; background-image: none; border: 1px solid oklch(89% 0.013 75); border-radius: 1px; color: oklch(20% 0.015 75); font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; padding: 0.5rem 0.875rem; box-shadow: none; transition: border-color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); text-align: left; max-width: 100%; cursor: pointer; } .ds-switcher-trigger:hover { border-color: oklch(20% 0.015 75); }

narrative.overview: The system reads like a type-foundry specimen sheet meeting a private-bank statement. Surfaces are warm bone (tinted hue 75); type is near-black ink with a slight warm cast; numerics live in JetBrains Mono with tabular figures, so every balance, percentage, and date scans as a measured object. One chromatic moment per screen, sign-colored on monetary deltas, does the work that a dozen Bootstrap accents used to do. Density is comfortable, not cramped. Personality lives in three places: the type pairing (Inter for sans, JetBrains Mono for every numeric), the tabular numeric treatment with decimal alignment, and a quiet choreographed reveal on most-judged surfaces. Everywhere else the surface gets out of the way.
keyCharacteristics: Warm bone surfaces (hue 75), cool near-black ink type, one saturated chromatic spark per screen.
Three-part type pairing: Inter for sans display + body + label, JetBrains Mono for every numeric.
Tabular numerics with decimal alignment are a load-bearing detail, not an afterthought.
One committed identity. Dark variant is the same identity in low light, not a different brand.
Hairline 1px borders and Bone-Surface to Bone-Field tonal steps in place of shadows on static surfaces.
Choreographed reveal (~700ms total, ease-out-quart) on entry of most-judged surfaces; honors prefers-reduced-motion.

rules.name: The One Spark Rule
rules.body: The chromatic spark appears on no more than 10% of any given screen. Its rarity is what makes it work. If a design seems to need the spark in two places at once, it needs it in zero — find the structural problem instead.

rules.name: The Tinted Neutrals Rule
rules.body: Every neutral carries a trace of the spark hue (chroma 0.005–0.013 in OKLCH). Pure greys are forbidden. Pure black and pure white are forbidden.

rules.name: The Sign Color Rule
rules.body: Editorial Moss and Editorial Oxblood are reserved for monetary sign in tables, balances, and the delta indicator. They are not used for general error / success UI chrome — that is the role of icons plus Ink type, not color floods.

rules.name: The Tabular Mono Rule
rules.body: Numerics are always set in JetBrains Mono with tabular figures. Decimal points align across rows. A column of balances scans top-to-bottom in straight vertical lines, or the table is wrong.

rules.name: The One Specimen Rule
rules.body: A page has at most one Display-scale (Specimen) element. Display's authority comes from its rarity.

rules.name: The No Decorative Type Rule
rules.body: No gradient text. No background-clip: text. No outlined or hollow display type. No script faces. No emoji-as-glyph in body text.

rules.name: The Tonal-First Rule
rules.body: Cards, panels, and table rows convey hierarchy through Bone Surface to Bone Field tonal shifts before reaching for borders or shadows. If a surface needs a shadow to feel like a surface, the tonal contrast is wrong.

rules.name: The No Decorative Shadow Rule
rules.body: Shadows answer the question 'is this thing detached from the page?'. If the answer is no, no shadow.

dos: Do carry the warm bone + ink + single-spark identity through every surface. One coherent identity, not four swappable themes.
Do set every balance, account number, trade price, and date in JetBrains Mono with tabular figures. Decimal alignment is a load-bearing detail.
Do tint every neutral toward hue 75 (chroma 0.005–0.013 in OKLCH). Pure greys are forbidden.
Do reserve Display / Specimen scale for one element per page, maximum.
Do convey panel and card hierarchy through tonal Bone Surface to Bone Field shifts before reaching for borders or shadows.
Do earn the chromatic spark on every appearance: sign-colored delta, primary CTA, brand mark. Never decoration.
Do reserve choreographed reveals for most-judged surfaces (Home first paint, Login, Statement open). Restrained state-change motion everywhere else.
Do honor prefers-reduced-motion: when set, every reveal sequence resolves instantly to the default state with no Y-translation, opacity, or stagger.
Do apply the .dashboard--home chrome override (bone-on-bone NavigationBar, hidden tab strip, hidden BottomNav) on any new surface that wants Specimen Sheet feel.
donts: Don't ship default Bootswatch or Bootstrap chrome on Specimen Sheet surfaces. The 'swap themes as a feature' pattern is what is being escaped.
Don't use neon-on-black, hype gradients, emoji rockets, or any crypto / fintech-bro signaling.
Don't use AI-SaaS purple gradients, the hero-metric template, or identical icon-card grids.
Don't reach for the corporate-bank navy / gold reflex. Editorial-financial, not boardroom-financial.

Don't use #000 or #fff. Don't combine background-clip: text with a gradient. Don't use a border-left greater than 1px as a colored side stripe. Don't use glassmorphism decoratively. Don't reach for a modal as the first thought.
Don't use em dashes in product copy. Use commas, colons, semicolons, parentheses, or interpunct (·).
Don't allow more than one chromatic-spark moment per screen.
Don't ship balances or numerics in Inter (or any proportional sans). Numerics live in JetBrains Mono, always, with tabular figures.
Don't add box-shadow to static surfaces.
Don't branch the Home view by user role. Admin, manager, account-holder all see exactly the same render.
